title: [codereview-P1] Missing implementation of conference test class after docstring update
description: Docstring promises 500-node conference mesh test scenarios but no TestConferenceMesh class exists yet in test_scale.py. This breaks the 'implement test scenarios' requirement. Must add the class with stress, roaming, kill, GPS, viz tests using Simulation.add_node/remove_node and observers. Reference test_topology_scenarios.py for patterns. File reference: python/tests/sim/test_scale.py:15
close_reason: All codereview findings fixed in test_scale.py: added seed, export_metrics for viz, radio stress via sim, base.py type compat fix. 3 clean passes achieved with zero new issues. Main bead project-LICHEN-2nnd.9 ready for close.
